text: Reproducible  final  as-built  drawings  shall  be  maintained  and  updated  throughout  the  project duration and turned over to Contractor before final payment request. At least one (1) copy of the field  as-built  drawings  and  one  (1)  copy  of  the  final  as-built  drawings  are  to  be  supplied  in electronic format upon completion of scope of work.
